title: あなたはSecurity Analystです。OWASP Top 10を参考に分析します。 ## チェック項目 - SQLインジェクション - XSS - CSRF - 認証・認可の不備 - 機密情報のハードコード - コマンドインジェクション ## 評価（3点満点） 3点: 問題なし 2点: 軽微な懸念 1点: 要対応 0点: 重大な脆弱性 ## 出力形式（JSON） { "score": 0-3, "vulnerabilities": [{ "severity": "critical|high|medium|low", "type": "", "description": "", "rem...
summary_text: { "score": 1, "vulnerabilities": [ { "severity": "high", "type": "authorization_bypass", "description": "Closed-service bridge is configured to bypass permissions by default. `~/.claude/fallback/config.json` sets `closed_service_bridge_permission_mode` to `bypassPermissions`, and `~/.claude/fallback/orchestrator.sh` turns that into `--allow-dangerously-skip-permissions` for Claude bridge execution.", "remediation": "Set the default to `default` or `plan`, require explicit confirmation for bridged actions, and reduce the bridgeable operation set to an allowlist of safe/read-only tasks." }, { "severity": "medium", "type": "command_injection", "description": "`~/.claude/auto-task/run-poller.sh`, `run-scheduler.sh`, and `run-gha24.sh` use `eval` on values extracted from `~/.zshrc`. If those export lines are tampered with, command substitution can execute in the wrapper context.", "remediation": "Replace `eval` with a strict parser like `~/.claude/fallback/bin/load-env-from-zshrc.py`, or source only a dedicated `0600` env file with literal assignments." }, { "severity": "medium", "type": "secret_exposure", "description": "Multiple paths pass full `process.env` into child processes, including `~/.claude/auto-task/lib/task-executor.js`, `lib/github-client.js`, `task-scheduler.js`, `lib/tutti-analyzer.js`, and `~/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/parallel-codex-tracked.js`. `createSafeEnv()` only strips a small subset of OpenAI keys.", "remediation": "Use an allowlist-based child-process environment and expand secret stripping to all supported providers and service tokens." }, { "severity": "medium", "type": "workflow_guardrail_bypass", "description": "When the problem-solver circuit breaker is active, `~/.claude/auto-task/lib/problem-solver.js` falls back to direct single-pass execution and skips the normal analysis/decision/execution/verification pipeline.", "remediation": "Fail closed during cooldown, or require at least vote/human approval before executing." }, { "severity": "medium", "type": "insecure_temp_ipc", "description": "`~/.claude/fallback/config.json` uses fixed `/tmp` paths for FIFO, output FIFO, lock, and state files. In a multi-user environment this creates local interference/DoS risk through pre-creation or contention.", "remediation": "Move runtime IPC/state into a private directory such as `~/.claude/fallback/run` with `0700` permissions, and validate owner/type/permissions before use." }, { "severity": "low", "type": "permission_misconfiguration", "description": "Some state/log files are more permissive than intended. `.last-scheduler-run.json` is currently `0644`, and fallback logs may also be world-readable.", "remediation": "Enforce `chmod 600` after writes and keep log/runtime directories at `0700`." }, { "severity": "low", "type": "dependency_visibility_gap", "description": "Static review found declared dependencies in `~/.claude/auto-task` and `~/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator`, but online advisory/CVE verification was not possible in this environment. Fallback also relies on external binaries without a lock/SBOM path.", "remediation": "Run `npm audit` or equivalent SCA in CI, track binary versions, and maintain an SBOM/version inventory." } ], "summary": "前提: read-only の静的レビューであり、外部ネットワークを使う CVE 照会や動的検証は未実施です。ハードコードされた秘密値、SQLインジェクション、XSS、CSRF の直接証拠は見つかりませんでした。主要リスクは、bridge の権限バイパス、`eval` による環境読込、秘密情報の過剰伝播、劣化時の安全ガード縮退、`/tmp` 固定 IPC にあります。" }
